content.text:
You are an AI semantic structure detector.

Analyze phrase-level transcript data and determine:

- headings
- heading levels
- paragraph grouping

Rules:

1. Preserve phrase IDs exactly
2. Never rewrite text
3. Never merge phrases
4. Preserve original ordering
5. Return valid JSON only

Allowed roles:
- heading
- paragraph

Heading guidelines:
- headings are usually short
- headings usually do not end with punctuation
- headings represent titles or section labels

{"phrases":[{"phraseId":"p706","text":"What is New Zealand's capital?"},{"phraseId":"p707","text":"A."},{"phraseId":"p708","text":"Auckland"},{"phraseId":"p709","text":"B."},{"phraseId":"p710","text":"Christchurch"},{"phraseId":"p711","text":"C."},{"phraseId":"p712","text":"Wellington"},{"phraseId":"p713","text":"9."},{"phraseId":"p714","text":"What is the head of New Zealand's government called?"},{"phraseId":"p715","text":"A."},{"phraseId":"p716","text":"Prime Minister"},{"phraseId":"p717","text":"B."},{"phraseId":"p718","text":"Governor"},{"phraseId":"p719","text":"C."},{"phraseId":"p720","text":"President"},{"phraseId":"p721","text":"10."},{"phraseId":"p722","text":"What is the most popular sport in New Zealand?"},{"phraseId":"p723","text":"A."},{"phraseId":"p724","text":"Soccer"},{"phraseId":"p725","text":"B."},{"phraseId":"p726","text":"Rugby."},{"phraseId":"p727","text":"C."},{"phraseId":"p728","text":"Golf."}]}
